slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Mphato wa 11 - Legato la FET
slides.title: Bosetšhaba: Afrika Borwa, Bohlabela bja Gare le Afrika
slides.lead: Go bapetša mekgatlo ye mene ya bosetšhaba - bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner le bja Ma-Afrika kua Afrika Borwa, le Bo-Zionism le bosetšhaba bja Ma-Arab kua Bohlabela bja Gare - go botšiša gore bosetšhaba bo ka kopanya batho bjang efela gape bja arola naga.

media.alt: Difolaga tše nne tša mokgabišo tše rotogago go tšwa lefaseng le tee la gare, tše emelago mekgatlo ye mene ya bosetšhaba yeo e bapetšwago.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='34' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='34' fill='none' stroke='#4f5d3a' stroke-width='2'/><g stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='3'><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='60' y2='34'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='262' y2='34'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='60' y2='150'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='262' y2='150'/></g><rect x='40' y='22' width='34' height='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='246' y='22' width='34' height='22' fill='#1f3a8a'/><rect x='40' y='140' width='34' height='22' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='246' y='140' width='34' height='22' fill='#2f5233'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlagiša yuniti ka moka bjalo ka dinyakišišo tša papetšo, e sego dikanegelo tše nne tša go arogana. Bolela potšišo ye kgolo ya histori: ke ka lebaka lang bosetšhaba - maatla ao a fago batho boitsebo, boikgantšho le tokologo - a tšwelela gantši ka go raka le dintwa? Šupetša sebopego: pele hlaloša bosetšhaba, ke moka o sekaseke mabaka a mabedi a Afrika Borwa (Ma-Afrikaner le Ma-Afrika), ke moka mabaka a mabedi a Bohlabela bja Gare (Bo-Zionism le bosetšhaba bja Ma-Arab), o bapetša ge o dutše o tšwela pele. Gopotša barutwana gore histori ye nngwe ye e phegišanwa kudu ebile e sa na le maikutlo a matla lehono, ka gona re swaragana le methopo ka bohlale le ka tlhompho.

slides.title: Bosetšhaba ke eng?
slides.lead: Bosetšhaba ke tumelo ya gore sehlopha sa batho seo se abelanago boitsebo se bopa 'setšhaba' seo se swanetšwego ke mmušo wa sona, boikanego le go ipuša.

blocks.text: **Setšhaba** ke *setšhaba se se akanywago*: maloko a sona a ka se ke a kopana le bontši bja badudi-gotee le bona, efela ba ikwa ba le gotee. **Bosetšhaba** bo fetola maikutlo ao a ba nyakišišo ya sepolotiki - tokelo ya go ipuša ka gare ga mmušo wa bona wa go itlhaola.

Ba-rametši ba histori gantši ba hlaola mehuta e mebedi. **Bosetšhaba bja badudi (civic nationalism)** bo hlalosa setšhaba ka bodudi, melao le mekgwa yeo e abelanwago, ka gona mang le mang a ka tsena. **Bosetšhaba bja setšo (ethnic nationalism)** bo bo hlalosa ka botšwadi, polelo, bodumedi goba setšo seo se abelanwago, seo se ka rakago batho ba ka ntle. Mekgatlo ye mentši ya nnete e kopanya tše pedi.

items: Gantši bo theilwe godimo ga polelo, bodumedi, histori goba maikutlo a botšwadi bja go swana.
Gantši bo hlohleletšwa goba bo tiiwa ke kgobalo yeo e abelanwago - go fenywa, bodiidi, kgethollo goba pušo ya bašele.
Bo aga botee ka go hlalosa 'rena', efela ka go dira bjalo bo hlalosa gape 'bona'.

slides.notes: Fa barutwana mareo a tshekatsheko ao ba tlago a šomiša mo yuniting ka moka: setšhaba, bosetšhaba, go ipuša, bosetšhaba bja badudi le bja setšo, le kgopolo ya Benedict Anderson ya 'setšhaba se se akanywago'. Gatelela gore bosetšhaba ga bo botse fela goba bo bobe fela - bo hlohleleditše tokologo kgahlanong le bokoloniale ebile bo hlohleleditše kgethollo le kgethologanyo (apartheid). Bokgoni bjo bo rutwago ke papetšo: kgopolo e swanago, maemo a fapanego.

slides.title: Dipotšišo tše hlano tšeo o ka di botšišago bosetšhaba bofe goba bofe
slides.lead: Šomiša lense e swanago mokgatlong o mongwe le o mongwe gore o kgone go di bapetša ka toka.

blocks.heading: Mang?
blocks.text: Ke mang yo a balwago bjalo ka karolo ya setšhaba - gomme ke mang yo a šadišitšwego ka ntle?

blocks.heading: Ke ka lebaka lang bjale?
blocks.text: Ke kgobalo goba tlhakahlakano efe yeo e hlohleleditšego mokgatlo?

blocks.heading: Bjang?
blocks.text: Baetapele ba huetše batho bjang - ka setšo, bodumedi, mekgatlo goba tiragatšo ya bontši?

blocks.heading: Naga?
blocks.text: Ba nyakile naga efe, gomme ke mang yo mongwe yo a bego a e nyaka?

blocks.heading: Sephetho?
blocks.text: A bo tlišitše tokologo, kgethologanyo, dintwa - goba tšohle tše tharo?

slides.notes: Ye ke lense ya papetšo yeo barutwana ba swanetšego go e šomiša go bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner, bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrika, Bo-Zionism le bosetšhaba bja Ma-Arab ka tatelano. Ba hlohleletše go boloka thlaka ya papetšo dipukung tša bona ka dikholomo tše tše hlano. Šupetša gore potšišo ya 'Naga?' ke moo dinyakišišo tše pedi di fetogago manyami: bobedi kua Afrika Borwa le Israel/Palestina, mekgatlo ye mebedi ya bosetšhaba e ile ya nyaka naga e swanago.

slides.title: Bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner: go fenywa, bodiidi le tsošološo
slides.lead: Bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner bo tšwelela go tswa go go tlhabišwa dihlong Ntweng ya Afrika Borwa (1899-1902) le bodiidi bjo Ma-Afrikaner a mantši a lebanego le bjona ka morago.

blocks.text: Go fenywa ke Brithania, lehu la basadi le bana dikampeng tša kgokelo (concentration camps), le go lahlegelwa ke direpabliki tša Maburu di ile tša tlogela Ma-Afrikaner a mantši a ikwa gore volk (setšhaba) sa bona se le kotsing. Mengwageng ye e latetšego makgolokgolo a masome a batho ba ile ba fetoga 'bathobašweu ba badiidi', ba raketšwe ka ntle ga naga ba ya metseng ye megolo.

Baetapele ba šomišitše **polelo, bodumedi le histori** go aga leswa boikgantšho. Seafrikanse se ile sa beakanywa le go tšweletšwa; Kereke ya Reformed ya Madatšhi e gatelela gore Ma-Afrikaner ke setšhaba se se kgethilwego; gomme kanegelo ya Leeto le Legolo (Great Trek) e ile ya fetoga nonwane ya go thoma ya setšhaba se se katanelago tokologo.

items: **Afrikaner Broederbond** (e thewa ka 1918) e agile netweke ya sephiri go tšwetša pele dikgahlego tša Ma-Afrikaner sepolotiking, kgwebong le setšong.
Mekgatlo ya setšo le sekgahla sa mengwaga ye lekgolo sa Great Trek ka 1938 di ile tša tsoša maikutlo a bontši.
**National Party** e ile ya iša boitsebo bjo bja bja go nyaka maatla a mmušo.

media.alt: Seriti sa koloi ya dikgomo ka fase ga letšatši le rotogago, se emelago Great Trek yeo e šomišitšwego bjalo ka sešupo sa bosetšhaba.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='170' cy='58' r='26' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#5a4a2a'><rect x='60' y='92' width='70' height='24'/><path d='M60 92 l14 -16 h44 l12 16 Z'/></g><circle cx='74' cy='120' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='120' cy='120' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='130' y1='104' x2='168' y2='100' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlaloša ka moo maikutlo a go ba mohlaselwa a ilego a fetošwa lenaneo la sepolotiki. Mokgwa wo bohlokwa: kgobalo (go fenywa, bodiidi bja bathobašweu ba badiidi) go tlaleletša huetšo ya setšo (polelo, kereke, nonwane ya histori, Broederbond) di lekana le mokgatlo wa bontši. Sekgahla sa mengwaga ye lekgolo sa Great Trek ka 1938 ke mohlala o mobotse wa moetlo o hlamilwego. [SME] Swaragana le kgopolo ya dikampe tša kgokelo ka šedi le ka nnete; e le ya nnete histaoring ebile e ile ya šomišwa sepolotiking ka morago. Šupetša gore ye ke bosetšhaba bja setšo bjo bo hlalošwago ka botšwadi, polelo le bodumedi.

slides.title: 1948: Bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner bo swara mmušo
slides.lead: Ka 1948 National Party e ile ya thopa maatla gomme ya fetola bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner go ba pholisi ya semmušo ya kgethologanyo (apartheid).

blocks.text: E etetšwe pele ke **D.F. Malan**, National Party e ile ya thopa dikgetho tša 1948 tša bathobašweu fela ka kholofetšo ya *apartheid* ('go arogana'). Bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner bjale bo be bo laola mmušo gomme ba o šomiša go šireletša mešomo ya Ma-Afrikaner, polelo le maatla - le go gapeletša pušo ya bathobašweu godimo ga bontši bja bathobaso.

items: Mmušo o ile wa oketša thuto ya Seafrikanse, tirelo ya setšhaba le diintasteri tša mmušo go emiša Ma-Afrikaner.
Melao ya kgethologanyo e ile ya hlopha batho ka morafe gomme ya beela bathobašweu maatla le ditokelo.
Ye ke molato wa bosetšhaba bjo bo fihleletšego go ipuša ga sehlopha se tee ka go se hlokela ba bangwe.

media.alt: Kerafo ya dipara e rotogago pele ga moago wa mmušo, e bontšha sehlopha se tee se hwetšago maatla ka theko ya ba bangwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='36' width='120' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M54 36 q36 -22 72 0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='42' y='48' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='130' y='48' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><rect x='160' y='108' width='16' height='28'/><rect x='182' y='88' width='16' height='48'/><rect x='204' y='60' width='16' height='76'/></g><rect x='28' y='136' width='196' height='6' fill='#5a4a2a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ngwaya ntlha ya tshekatsheko ka bogale: bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner bo ile bja 'atlega' ka 1948, efela katlego ya bjona e be e le kgatelelo ya batho ba bangwe. Se se hloma thulano ye e lebanego le bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrika. Kgokaganya morago le lense: Ke mang yo a akareditšwego? (Ma-Afrikaner, ke moka bathobašweu.) Ke mang yo a hloketšwego? (Bontši bja bathobaso.) Ela hloko gore kgethologanyo e be e le karolo ya morero wa go hlola mešomo le go emiša Ma-Afrikaner a madiidi, seo se thušago go hlaloša go rateha ga yona setšhabeng sa yona.

slides.title: Bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrika: botee kgahlanong le go hlokela
slides.lead: Bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrika bo golile bjalo ka karabelo go go thopša, go lahlegelwa ke naga le go hlokelwa Kopanong ya Afrika Borwa yeo e bopilwego ka 1910.

blocks.text: Kopano ya Afrika Borwa (1910) e ile ya kopanya bathobašweu efela ya thibela Ma-Afrika go maatla a sepolotiki. Ka 1912 baetapele ba Ma-Afrika ba rutegilego ba ile ba thea **South African Native National Congress** - yeo e reilwego leina leswa la **African National Congress (ANC)** ka 1923 - go kopanya Ma-Afrika go phatša mešwao ya setšo le ya selegae le go nyaka ditokelo setšhabeng se tee se se abelanwago.

**Molao wa Naga wa Bommannaga wa 1913 (Natives Land Act)**, wo o beetšego bathobašweu bontši bja naga ya naga, o ile wa bontšha lebaka la ge botee bo be bo tlhokega ka pele. Bosetšhaba bja mathomo bja Ma-Afrika bo be bo fokola: bo šomišitše dikopo, diromiwa le molao go kgopela go akaretšwa.

items: Bo be bo ikemišeditše go fenya dikarogano tša setšo le go aga setšhaba se tee sa Ma-Afrika, ka morago se se sa hlophego ka morafe (non-racial), sa Afrika Borwa.
Bo hlalošitše setšhaba ka bodudi le ditokelo tše di abelanwago - pono ya badudi kudu.
Mekgwa ya bjona ya mathomo e be e le ya molaotheo; go tenega go tla ba iša ka morago go tiragatšo ya bontši.

media.alt: Diswantšho tše nnyane tše ntši tša dibopego tše fapanego di swara diatla go bopa sedikadikwe se tee, di emela botee mo dihlopheng ka moka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='120' cy='40' r='11'/><circle cx='176' cy='62' r='11'/><circle cx='176' cy='108' r='11'/><circle cx='120' cy='130' r='11'/><circle cx='64' cy='108' r='11'/><circle cx='64' cy='62' r='11'/></g><circle cx='120' cy='85' r='52' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' stroke-dasharray='6 6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bapetša mabaka a go thoma le bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner: bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrika bo nyakile go aga botee mo dihlopheng tše ntši tša setšo tša Ma-Afrika (Zulu, Xhosa, Sotho le tše dingwe) go ganetša mmušo o o ba hloketšego. Gatelela pono ya go akaretša ka go feta - ANC mafelelong e ile ya šutha go ya go non-racialism. Ela hloko go fapana mo yuniti e dulago e boela go gona: mekgatlo ye mebedi ya bosetšhaba bja Afrika Borwa, o mongwe o nyaka pušo, o mongwe o nyaka go akaretšwa, e thulana godimo ga naga e swanago.

slides.title: Moloko o moswa: ANC Youth League
slides.lead: Ka bo-1940 moloko o moswa o ile wa nyaka bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrika bjo bogolo, bja bontši.

blocks.text: Ba tenegile ka mengwaga ye mentši ya dikopo tša maitshwaro, baetapele ba bafsa ba ile ba thea **ANC Youth League** ka 1944. Mopresidente wa yona wa mathomo, **Anton Lembede**, o ile a bolela gore Ma-Afrika a swanetše go itokolla ka boikgantšho, boitshepho le mokgatlo wa bontši go e na le go emela botho bja bathobašweu.
Africa is a black man's country... Africans are one. Out of the heterogeneous tribes there must emerge a homogeneous nation.
blocks.cite: Anton Lembede, 'Some Basic Principles of African Nationalism', 1945

items: Lenaneo la Tiragatšo la 1949 la Youth League le ile la amogela dikgohlano, di-boycott le go se kwe molao ka mokgwa wa khuduego.
Batho ba bjalo ka Nelson Mandela, Walter Sisulu le Oliver Tambo ba ile ba rotoga ka gare ga yona.
Bosetšhaba bjo bja Ma-Afrika bjo bo tiilego bo tla hlohleletša ntwa ya bontši kgahlanong le kgethologanyo ka bo-1950.

slides.notes: Šomiša seka sa ga Lembede go bontšha pelo ya maikutlo ya bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrika - boitshepho le botee mo mešwaong ya setšo - ge o dutše o ela hloko gore setšo se segolo sa ANC le sona se ile sa šutha go ya go non-racialism (ka morago Freedom Charter). [SME] Bo-Africanism bja Lembede e be e le tselana e tee; ANC e be e na le ngangišano magareng ga Africanism ya go ikgetha le non-racialism ya go akaretša, yeo ka morago e ilego ya tliša karogano ya PAC (1959). Boloka nnete: bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrika e be e se selo se tee fela. Kgokaganya go ya pele: moloko wo o etella pele Defiance Campaign yeo Mphato wa 9 o e sekasekilego.

slides.title: Bosetšhaba bjo bobedi, naga e tee
slides.lead: Bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner le bja Ma-Afrika bo golile mmogo, se sengwe le se sengwe se bopa se sengwe.

items: Bo theilwe godimo ga go fenywa ke Brithania le bodiidi bja bathobašweu.
Bja setšo: bo hlalošwa ka botšwadi, Seafrikanse le kereke.
Nepo: go ipuša le tšhireletšo ya volk ya Ma-Afrikaner.
Bo thopile mmušo ka 1948 gomme bja aga kgethologanyo.
Bo fihleletše tokologo ya bjona ka go laola ba bangwe.
Bo theilwe godimo ga go thopša, go lahlegelwa ke naga le go hlokelwa.
Nepo ya badudi: go kopanya dihlopha tše ntši go ba setšhaba se tee.
Nepo: ditokelo tše di lekanago le pušo ya bontši.
Bo tiile go ba ntwa ya bontši go tloga ka bo-1940-1950.
Bo nyakile tokologo ka go akaretša, e sego ka pušo.

slides.notes: Ema mo bakeng sa tiro ya papetšo ye e rulagantšwego. Kgopela barutwana go šupa go swana (bobedi bo šomišitše histori, setšo le mokgatlo go huetša; bobedi bo nyakile go ipuša) le go fapana (bo bongwe bo ikgethago ebile bo buša, bo bongwe bo akaretšago ebile bo hloketšwe). Gatelela kamano: kgatelelo ya bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner e tiišitše bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrika, gomme kganetšo ya Ma-Afrika e tiišitše bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner. Go bopana mmogo mo ke temogo ye bohlokwa ya maemo a godimo bakeng sa FET.

slides.title: Bo-Zionism: legae la setšhaba sa Bajuda
slides.lead: Bo-Zionism e be e le mokgatlo wa bosetšhaba o nyakago legae la Bajuda, kudu bjalo ka karabelo go makgolokgolo a mengwaga a kgatelelo kua Yuropa.

blocks.text: Ba lebane le kgethollo ya Bajuda ya sehlogo - dipogrom kua Mmušong wa Russia le Merero ya Dreyfus (Dreyfus Affair) kua Fora - **Theodor Herzl** o ile a bolela ka *The Jewish State* (1896) gore Bajuda ba tla ba bolokega feela ge ba na le mmušo wa bona. Kopano ya Mathomo ya Zionist e ile ya kopana kua Basel ka 1897, gomme go huduga ga Bajuda go ya Palestina go ile gwa gola.

Ka **Tsebišo ya Balfour (Balfour Declaration, 1917)** Brithania e ile ya tsebiša thekgo ya 'legae la setšhaba la Bajuda' kua Palestina - naga yeo ka nako yeo e bego e le ya Ma-Arab kudu. Brithania e ile ya buša Palestina ka fase ga taolo ya Kopano ya Ditšhaba (League of Nations) ka morago ga 1920, gomme dikgohlano magareng ga ditšhaba tša Bajuda le Ma-Arab tša gola.

items: Bo-Zionism bo kopantše boitsebo bja setšo le bja bodumedi le nyakišišo ya sebjalebjale ya mmušo.
Bo hlohleleditšwe ke kgethollo ya nnete ye e bolayago, kudukudu Polao ya Bajuda (Holocaust) ya 1941-1945.
Efela naga yeo bo e nyakago e be e šetše e le legae la setšhaba sa Ma-Arab seo se nago le maikutlo a sona a bosetšhaba.

media.alt: Naledi ya dintlha tše tshela godimo ga molatswana wa mokgabišo, e emelago pitšo ya Bo-Zionism ya legae la Bajuda.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='none' stroke='#1f3a8a' stroke-width='6' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M120 34 L146 94 L86 58 L154 58 L94 94 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Hlagiša Bo-Zionism bjalo ka karabelo go kgethollo ya nnete, ya go bolaya, e fihlelela sehlohlolo ka Polao ya Bajuda (Holocaust) - barutwana ba swanetše go kwešiša lebaka la ge Bajuda ba bantši ba ile ba phetha gore ba nyaka mmušo wa bona. Ka nako e swanago, ba le nnete gore Palestina e be e šetše e agilwe, kudu ke Ma-Arab, ka gona naga e swanago e be e swere dinyakišišo tše pedi. [SME] Ye ke histori ye e phegišanwago kudu; boloka dintlha tše di dumelelanwago ke bontši (Herzl, Basel 1897, Balfour 1917, Taolo ya Brithania) gomme o pheme go tšea lehlakore. Ruta go sekaseka methopo: Tsebišo ya Balfour le yona e holofeditše go se senye ditokelo tša 'ditšhaba tše di lego gona tšeo e sego tša Bajuda'.

slides.title: 1948: boipušo le masetlapelo
slides.lead: Tiragalo e swanago ya 1948 e gopolwa ke ditšhaba tše pedi ka ditsela tše di fapanego kudu.

blocks.text: Ka morago ga Polao ya Bajuda (Holocaust) le go gola ga thulano, Ditšhaba tše Kopanego (United Nations) di ile tša bouta ka 1947 go arola Palestina go ba mmušo wa Bajuda le mmušo wa Ma-Arab. Ka **14 Mopitlo 1948** baetapele ba Bajuda ba ile ba tsebiša **Mmušo wa Israel (State of Israel)**. Ntwa le mebušo ya Ma-Arab ya kgauswi ya latela gateetee.

Ma-Israel a gopola 1948 bjalo ka **Ntwa ya bona ya Boipušo** - go fihlelela legae le le bolokegilego. Ma-Palestina a e gopola bjalo ka **Nakba** ('masetlapelo'): go akanywa gore Ma-Arab a Palestina a 700 000 a ile a tšhaba goba a lelekwa gomme a se ke a dumelelwa go boela. Naga e tee, ditšhaba tše pedi, dikgopolo tše pedi tše di sa kwanego.

items: Go setšhaba se tee, 1948 e be e ra go ipuša le go phologa.
Go se sengwe, e be e ra go amogwa le go lelekwa.
Thulano ye e sa rarollwago e sa bopa Bohlabela bja Gare le lehono.

media.alt: Naga e tee e arotšwe ke mothaladi o o emego, lehlakore le lengwe le rotoga le le lengwe le sepela, di emela dikgopolo tše pedi tše di fapanego tša 1948.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='16' y='30' width='96' height='100' fill='#a8bcae'/><rect x='128' y='30' width='96' height='100' fill='#d8c6a8'/><rect x='116' y='24' width='8' height='112' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#1f3a8a'><path d='M64 60 L74 84 L54 70 L86 70 L66 84 Z'/></g><g fill='#5a4a2a'><circle cx='160' cy='72' r='7'/><rect x='153' y='80' width='14' height='24'/><path d='M172 88 h22 l-8 -8 v16 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Ye ke slaete ye e phegišanwago kudu ka gare ga deke; e rute bjalo ka thuto ya pono le kgopolo ya histori. Hlagiša maina ka bobedi a 1948 mmogo ntle le go a beakanya ka maemo, gomme o šomiše polelo ya 'e gopolwa bjalo ka'. [SME] Dipalo le mabaka a go tšhaba ga Ma-Palestina a phegišanwa e le ka nnete ke ba-rametši ba histori (go tšhaba goba go lelekwa); hlagiša palo ye ka bakwa ya ~700,000 bjalo ka tekanyo gomme o ele hloko ngangišano. Nepo ya go ruta ke kwelobohloko le go sekaseka methopo: tiragalo e swanago ya letšatši e tšweletša dikanegelo tše pedi tša setšhaba. Laletša poledišano ya khutšo le ya tlhompho gomme o beye melao ya motheo pele.

slides.title: Bosetšhaba bja Ma-Arab: botee le boipušo
slides.lead: Bosetšhaba bja Ma-Arab bo nyakile go lokolla batho bao ba bolelago SeArab go pušo ya bašele gomme, go ba bangwe, go ba kopanya go ba setšhaba se tee.

blocks.text: Ge Mmušo wa Ottoman o putlama ka morago ga Ntwa ya Lefase ya Mathomo, dinaga tša Ma-Arab di ile tša arolwa go ba ditaolo tša Brithania le Fora. Ma-nationalist a Ma-Arab a be a tenwa ke taolo ye ya bašele le mellwane yeo e thadilwego ke Ma-Yuropa, gomme a ganetša kudu go dula ga Bo-Zionist kua Palestina.

Mokgatlo o ile wa fihlelela sehlohlolo ka fase ga **Gamal Abdel Nasser** wa Egepeta. Ge Nasser a **fetotše Kanale ya Suez (Suez Canal) go ba ya mmušo ka 1956** gomme a lebana le tlhaselo ya Brithania, Fora le Israel, o ile a fetoga mogale lefaseng ka moka la Ma-Arab le sešupo sa mekgatlo ya kgahlanong le bokoloniale go ralala Afrika le Asia.

items: Bo be bo theilwe godimo ga polelo ya SeArab yeo e abelanwago, setšo le (go ba bantši) Boislamo.
**Pan-Arabism** e be e lora go kopanya Ma-Arab ka moka, e kopanya Egepeta le Syria ka nakwana ka 1958.
Bo be bo le kgahlanong le bokoloniale kudu gomme bo hlohleleditše dintwa tša boipušo tša Afrika.

media.alt: Ketane e robegilego godimo ga kanale ya mokgabišo, e emelago bosetšhaba bja Ma-Arab bja kgahlanong le bokoloniale le Merero ya Suez.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='104' y='30' width='32' height='108' fill='#4f7fae'/><g fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='72' cy='58' r='14'/><circle cx='96' cy='72' r='14'/></g><g fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='168' cy='58' r='14'/><circle cx='144' cy='72' r='14'/></g><line x1='108' y1='66' x2='132' y2='66' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-dasharray='4 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bontšha bosetšhaba bja Ma-Arab bjalo ka mokgatlo o mongwe wa kgahlanong le bokoloniale, o o kgokelago molato wa Bohlabela bja Gare morago le Afrika (hlogo ya CAPS e akaretša tše pedi). Nasser le Suez 1956 ke ntlha ye kgolo: maatla a manyane a ganetša beng ba koloniale ba pele a ile a thabiša lefase le le lokologago, go akaretša Afrika ka fase ga Sahara. Ela hloko go gogana ka gare ga bosetšhaba bja Ma-Arab magareng ga botee bja pan-Arab le mebušo ya go ikema, le gore kganetšo ya Bo-Zionism e be e le e nngwe ya mabaka a go kopanya. Kgokaganya maatla a kgahlanong le bokoloniale le bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrika bjo bo sekasekilwego pele.

slides.title: Bosetšhaba bjo bobedi, naga e tee
slides.lead: Go swana le Afrika Borwa, Bohlabela bja Gare bo bone mekgatlo ye mebedi ya bosetšhaba e nyaka naga e swanago.

items: Karabelo go kgethollo ya Bajuda ya Yuropa le Polao ya Bajuda (Holocaust).
Setšo-bodumedi: legae la setšhaba sa Bajuda.
Nepo: mmušo o bolokegilego wa Bajuda kua Palestina.
Bo fihleletše boipušo ka 1948 (Israel).
Katlego ya bjona e ile ya raka setšhaba sa Ma-Arab a Palestina.
Karabelo go go putlama ga Ottoman le pušo ya bokoloniale ya Yuropa.
Bo theilwe godimo ga polelo ya SeArab le setšo se se abelanwago.
Nepo: boipušo le (go ba bangwe) botee bja Ma-Arab.
Bo fihleletše sehlohlolo ka Nasser le Merero ya Suez ya 1956.
Bo ganeditše Bo-Zionism gomme bja hlohleletša Afrika ya kgahlanong le bokoloniale.

slides.notes: Diriša tiro ye e swanago ya papetšo bjalo ka slaete ya Afrika Borwa. Ke moka o dire kgokaganyo ya go phatša-molato pepeneneng: bobedi Afrika Borwa le Palestina di bontšha mekgatlo ye mebedi ya bosetšhaba e thulana godimo ga naga e tee, e tšweletša thulano ye telele, ya bohloko. Kgopela barutwana go bapetša e sego feela Bo-Zionism kgahlanong le bosetšhaba bja Ma-Arab, efela le bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner kgahlanong le Bo-Zionism (bobedi ba banyane ba nyaka tšhireletšo le pušo) le bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrika kgahlanong le bosetšhaba bja Ma-Arab (bobedi mekgatlo ya bontši ya kgahlanong le bokoloniale). Papetšo ye ya matlhakore a mane ke yona kgopolo ya maemo a godimo yeo CAPS e e putsago.

slides.title: Bosetšhaba: maatla ao a kopanyago le a arolago
slides.lead: Go phatša mabaka ka moka a mane, bosetšhaba bo file batho boitsebo le tokologo - gomme bja thala mellwane yeo e išitšego thulanong.

blocks.alt: Thlaka ya nako ya diragalo tša bohlokwa tša bosetšhaba go tloga 1897 go fihla 1958 go ralala Afrika Borwa le Bohlabela bja Gare.

events.label: Kopano ya Mathomo ya Zionist, Basel
SANNC (ka morago ANC) e thewa kua Afrika Borwa
Tsebišo ya Balfour ka 'legae la setšhaba' la Bajuda
ANC Youth League e tiiša bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrika
National Party e thopa maatla; Mmušo wa Israel wa tsebišwa / Nakba
Nasser le Merero ya Suez: sehlohlolo sa bosetšhaba bja Ma-Arab

slides.notes: Kopanya ka thlaka ye e abelanwago gore barutwana ba bone mekgatlo ye mene e phethagala nakong e swanago, e huetšana (kgahlanong le bokoloniale go phatlaladitše dikgopolo go phatša mellwane). Ngwaya kgang ya mafelelo: bosetšhaba ke maatla a matlhakore a mabedi - a matlafaditše tokologo go bokoloniale le kgethologanyo, efela moo mekgatlo ye mebedi ya bosetšhaba e nyakago naga e tee a tšweleditše go amogwa le thulano ye e tšwelago pele. Ela hloko 1948 bjalo ka ngwaga wo o kgahlišago wo o tšweletšego dinyakišišong tše pedi tše di fapanego ka nako e tee.

slides.title: Tekolo: go bapetša mekgatlo ya bosetšhaba
slides.lead: Šomiša lense ya dipotšišo tše hlano le dipapetšo go araba dipotšišo tše di lego ka fase.

blocks.text: Thutong ye re hlalošitše bosetšhaba, re hlaotše bosetšhaba **bja badudi (civic)** go bja **setšo (ethnic)**, gomme ra bapetša mekgatlo ye mene: bosetšhaba bja **Ma-Afrikaner** le bja **Ma-Afrika** kua Afrika Borwa, le **Bo-Zionism** le bosetšhaba bja **Ma-Arab** kua Bohlabela bja Gare. Mafelong ka bobedi mekgatlo ye mebedi ya bosetšhaba e nyakile naga e swanago, ka ditlamorago tše di fihlelelago kgole.

blocks.question: Hlaloša phapano magareng ga bosetšhaba bja badudi (civic) le bja setšo (ethnic), o šomiša mohlala o TEE wa Afrika Borwa le o TEE wa Bohlabela bja Gare.
Bapetša metheo ya bosetšhaba bja Ma-Afrikaner le bja Ma-Afrika. Šupetša bonyennyane go swana go gobedi le go fapana go gobedi.

'Diragalo tša 1948 di rile tokologo go setšhaba se tee le tahlego go se sengwe.' O šomiša mohlala wa Afrika Borwa GOBA wa Israel-Palestina, ahlaahla ka moo motsotso o swanago wa histori o ka gopolwago ka ditsela tše di fapanego kudu.

slides.notes: Šomiša dipotšišo tše tharo bjalo ka mošomo o ngwadilwego goba ngangišano ya klase ye e rulagantšwego; dikabo tša maswao di bontšha mekgwa ya CAPS ya go ngwala go gologolo le ya methopo. Potšišo ya 3 e sekaseka ka go lebanya bokgoni bja go kwešiša kgopolo le pono tše di phegišanwago, tšeo e lego bohlokwa hlogong ye. Gopotša barutwana go ngangišana go tšwa go bohlatse le go emela lehlakore le lengwe le le lengwe ka toka. [SME] Pele o sekaseka thuto ya Israel/Palestina, netefatša gore tlhahlo ya kgoro ya go ruta hlogo ye e phegišanwago e latetšwe le gore go abilwe methopo ye e fapafapanego.
